title: BTC ML Model – +13,000 Points in 60 Days, Built for Risk Control
author: Spirited_Syllabub488
selftext:
I’ve been running a BTC machine learning model live for the past two months. In the last 15 signals (\~75 days) it generated about +25,000 points, but the real edge is in how it’s structured.

🔹 **How it works:**  
– Trades last \~4 days, with fixed entry/exit times.  
– No SL/TP — floating PnL doesn’t matter, only the final close.  
– Low leverage = no capital blow-ups.

🔹 **Risk philosophy:**  
The system accepts losing trades. Instead of cutting early, it relies on net outcomes across signals — a portfolio-style mindset for BTC.

🔹 **Performance vs SPY:**  
Over 3 years of testing, it hasn’t posted a losing quarter. On a risk-adjusted basis (Sharpe \~4.8), it beat SPY buy & hold with smaller drawdowns.

🔹 **Future outlook:**  
I’m expanding the same ML framework to ETHUSD and even FX majors, aiming to run multiple uncorrelated models together.

🔹 **Declaration:**  
People often ask, *“If it works, why sell it?”* Simple — I don’t yet manage large capital. Compounding takes time, so sharing access for a small fee helps me scale faster while I keep trading my own account. The strategy isn’t harmed by more users running the same signals.

📊 **Full stats here:**
